Mrs. II. NJ. Prayer: 81 believe
that most women want and should
have an equal right to vote, be-
cause it is only just and right. |
do not believe in taxation without
representation. therefore | believe
that every taxpayer should have a
vote regardless of sex.


There are many other reasons
why | believe women should be
given the privilege of voting In
most states except the suffrage
states there is a law in existence
which will not allow the widow to
be the guardian of her own child
unless it is so specified in the will
of her husband The husband, in
case his wife died, may take the
guardianship of his child, yet the
mother of the child is deprived of
the same right. 1t is unjust, and
the conditions and laws will only
be altered when women have an
equal voice in government affairs
